productDisplayName: Timberland Men Vintage Rugged Cargo Khaki Shirt
description: Composition Khaki colored full sleeved shirt made of 100% organic cotton,  with  tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, with appliqued brand logo on the facing placket, patch pockets on both chest with thread detailing , full length buttoned placket with embroidered logo on left sleeve, button on mid-biceps, and curved hemline  Fitting Regular  Wash care Machine wash in cold water at 30 degree C Wash separately before wearing for the first time Wash dark colours separately only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry normal Warm iron Dry cleanable  Time to look like the classic rugged hero right out of a Hollywood movie! This khaki colored shirt from timberland has been specially treated to give it a weathered look, making it ideal for outdoor wear. Team it with well-fitting jeans and rugged boots to look like a young Indiana Jones!  This shirt has been manufactured in an environment-friendly manner, with the aim to reduce the Carbon Footprint  Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
